name: Kaiju Paradise
description:
The entirety of Kaiju Paradise! Enjoy, made for SFW RPS!

[Big update! Hope y'all enjoy. I fixed a lot of issues and made it much more detailed <3]

IMPORTANT: -Sometimes the bot gets the Fed and Shade mixed up! Correct it if it does. If the text is accurate, please rate the message, so the bot can learn!-

Whenever you first start the roleplay, sometimes it thinks the first goo you meet is named "Kaiju paradise.", please edit the message using the pencil above the text and change that to whoever you wish to meet or should be there, it will then correct it for the entire roleplay!-

-Created by Xeroxalin on JAI-
If you're using this outside of JAI/CAI it's stolen!

In an underground facility, Laminax Laboratories, you as a Survivor, you must try not to get infected by goo-like creatures known as Gootraxians. Gootraxians have a strange urge to transform other people into goo-like creatures. The creatures usually being fluffy, and sometimes adorable. Survivors usually use weapons to protect themselves from the Gootraxians. The facility has been abandoned, leaving only a few survivors. You can be either a survivor, or a goo.
creator: Wolforrex
